page.title: C2 Mixed Revision
page.subtitle_html: C2 mixed revision - final English Sentence Builder C2 review across advanced grammar, cohesion, and formal style.
page.subtitle_text: Final English Sentence Builder C2 review across advanced grammar, cohesion, and formal style.

blocks.body: {"level":"C2","intro":"C2 mixed revision: compact anchors for the final English Sentence Builder C2 drill across advanced conditionals, cohesion, modality, and formal grammar.","rules":[{"label":"Advanced review","text":"Combine previously learned C2 patterns without changing the intended register or meaning.","example":"Had it not been for his support, the project would have failed."},{"label":"Cohesion and precision","text":"Keep sentence links clear when combining contrast, result, reference, or reformulation.","example":"That said, the conclusion requires stronger evidence."},{"label":"Final accuracy","text":"Check modal meaning, passive style, dense noun phrases, and formal tone in one controlled sentence.","example":"You need not have arrived so early."}]}

blocks.heading: C2 focus
blocks.body: This compact page anchors the final English Sentence Builder C2 mixed revision package.
